title: Athyrium quadripinnatifidum
taxonomy: Athyrium quadripinnatifidum is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is a type of lady fern, characterized by its complex pinnate leaves. The plant is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. Athyrium quadripinnatifidum is a relatively rare species, found in shaded, humid areas. As a member of the Athyriaceae family, it is closely related to other species of lady ferns.
